source.title: Oregon Defensive Setup for 2025 - Rainbow Six Siege
source.notes: Creator explicitly does NOT show the Kitchen/Dining site setup in this video (calls it the worst defensive site on the map) and points viewers to an older ~18-month-old Oregon video for that instead. Only two sites are covered here: Top Floor (Armory/Attic/Kids/Trophy/Master) and Basement (Ebox/Laundry/Freezer), plus a combined Meeting/Kitchen site (referred to by the creator as 'meeting and kitchen', the site he recommends playing instead of Kitchen/Dining). Room/callout names are the creator's informal ones and haven't been reconciled against wiki-canonical Oregon callouts. Auto-generated captions had some garbled operator names/jargon (e.g. 'Wai', 'army'/'a zombie', 'Cade') — see notes below where ambiguous. Rewrite pass: reliable top-down blueprint grounding for Oregon could not be obtained (Ubisoft, r6maps.com, Liquipedia, bo3.gg, and siege.gg either returned no renderable blueprint content or blocked automated fetches, and no browser was available to render the interactive map tools) — compass directions have been omitted from all locations in this file rather than guessed; locations use room/feature names only.

reinforcements.note: Reinforce. Don't swing the door itself — exposed to angles from the balcony, top repel, bottom repel, and both sides of the door. Optional: hold a tight standing rotate here to challenge with a shotgun and burn a couple of drones early, then retreat and reinforce afterward.

rotates.location: Attic to Kids, Vault Rotate Option
rotates.note: Vault-style rotate over the bed hides your feet from someone prone-dropping and shooting from behind the bed. Slower to move between sides than a standing rotate.
Pair with feet holes on the right side. Gives an exit from Attic other than getting stuck in Hobo with only White Stairs or the back room.
Make this a rotate, not just head holes. Lets you fight onto Trophy or Big Window and gives players coming up Top White another route in.

hatches.note: Leave open, do not reinforce. Lets you hold the door below from underneath and watch the planks from below/Meeting. Place a prox alarm near the hatch to pinpoint attackers to one channel for a pre-aimed shot.
Open this hatch and watch the door below for the first ~20 seconds of the round only.

gadgetPlacements.note: Strong camera spot — clear view out through the lampshade.

gadgetPlacements.location: Over the Main Breach Wall Once Opened
gadgetPlacements.note: C4 can be thrown over the top mid-round. Stand on the raised step/platform, not floor level, for a better arc that drops closer to the door. Don't smoke here — it sticks to the ceiling.

operatorRecommendations.note: Reinforces the Armory-into-Master head hole wall setup.
Sets up a camera in the lampshade area.

generalTips.note: Default plant spot downstairs (corner of Z/Zed) lines up almost exactly below a torn piece of wallpaper up here — reference for where the plant will be.
The gap between Trophy Door and Top White is one of the busiest traffic areas on the map — commonly camped, sometimes with a large prop for cover similar to a shield.

reinforcements.note: Reinforce to peek onto Blue without giving your position away. Pair a mirror here with a Jäger (or an operator who stops the mirror being destroyed by an Ash charge) and a reinforced, barricaded hatch/door.
Reinforce the rest of this wall around the rotate hole on the right side — fight onto Laundry and side-step onto Freezer stairs.

headHoles.location: High Hole Toward the Tower (Above Ebox)
headHoles.note: Higher than a normal head hole, used to peek onto the tower. Unfavorable fight — mainly denies attackers walking down the stairs for free.

rotates.note: Fights Laundry, Freezer stairs (partially), and Blue from one spot.
Make this rotate plus a small punch hole — catches attackers off guard coming down from Pillar. Lets you hold Blue and fall back onto this angle if Blue is lost.

gadgetPlacements.note: Shoot both fans out. Smokes thrown into Laundry or at the Laundry door otherwise catch on the blades.
Place a couple of prox mines above the door and smoke the stairs to hold Freezer stairs directly with a shotgun.

gadgetPlacements.location: Angle onto the Box Near Ebox/Blue
gadgetPlacements.note: Surya Gate wall to hold a one-way angle onto the stairs near Pillar. Source audio named the operator unclearly; treat as reasonably confident, not certain.

Guard the blue door to stop Ash charges destroying a mirror placed near Ebox. Jäger is confirmed. The second operator name is unconfirmed from source audio — Wamai fits the stated purpose but treat as unconfirmed.

operatorRecommendations.note: Protects a mirror placed near Ebox from an Ash charge on the blue door.
Holds a one-way barrier angle near Pillar onto the stairs. Don't stand too far back or you'll get domed from Blue.

generalTips.note: Always barricade the Laundry door for an extra audio cue.
Watch the angle on the box near Ebox that sees the bottom of the Freezer stairs — pre-fire it immediately on dropping down, attackers commonly pre-fire that corner themselves.
Default plant spot can be denied with C4s and smokes from a specific angle; watch for a hatch drop into a plant.
Attackers planting tucked against the cupboard are exposed to Freezer. Attackers planting directly on the door can't be seen from Freezer but have to loop all the way around.
Watch the angle behind the bomb from a hatch drop — pre-fire it immediately after dropping.

reinforcements.location: Wall Into the Corridor Near Z

reinforcements.note: Reinforced, same as the standalone Attic walls.

headHoles.location: Wall Bordering the Hatch, Looking Into Kitchen
headHoles.note: Preferred over reinforcing this wall — see through the hatch and back into Kitchen.

headHoles.location: Rotate Wall Between Kids and Kitchen (Upstairs)
headHoles.note: Head holes here over just the rotate — gives a lot of visibility.

rotates.location: Wall Toward Green, One Side Only
rotates.note: Pick one side, not both. Hold the angle toward people coming through the Green door — leaving the far side open lets an attacker hold a long angle deep into the site.

rotates.location: Rotate Between Kitchen and Meeting, Right Side
rotates.note: Use a box for cover fighting through it, hold further back. Cuts off Split door as a viable attacker angle.
Escape from Kitchen when squeezed — go up White Stairs to flank, or fall back to Lobby.
Same as the standalone Attic/Kids rotate.
Covers anyone pushing through the Security rotate — tighter angle than holding from the hatch.

hatches.note: Open. Hold the door below from here and cover the breach if opened.
Leave open — C4 over the top onto anyone walking through, or drop for a kill late in the round. Missing the C4 and dropping means fighting back up Big Tower stairs from the basement.

gadgetPlacements.location: Upstairs, Over the Two Reinforced Walls
gadgetPlacements.note: Electroclaw here reinforces those two walls plus the wall below.

operatorRecommendations.note: Electroclaw placement reinforces multiple walls from a single upstairs position. Watch your feet near the drone-able gap here.

generalTips.note: Most common plant spot is through the main breach, tucked behind a bench that can't be seen over.
Hold upstairs with at least two players.
Strong anchor spot far back near the rotate/wall area downstairs.
The default breach angle onto the bench plant spot is well hidden — attackers can plant in as little as ~30 seconds. Drone it.

Play this site instead of Kitchen/Dining — Kitchen/Dining is opened easily with a thermite charge dropped through the floor from above, with no reliable counter beyond an unfavorable Small Tower hold plus impact-grenade tricks against the thermite from below.
